ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  Banco Products (India) Limited has appointed three individuals – Mr. Parasram Parihar, Mr. Jigar Pathak, and Mr. Rakesh Motekar – to Senior Management Personnel (SMP) roles, effective June 29, 2026, as part of an internal restructuring. These appointments aim to strengthen critical operational areas, as the new SMPs bring extensive experience in supply chain, purchase, and vendor development within the automobile sector. The disclosure appears to be a routine corporate governance update, with no immediate red flags identified.
